items.description: Defines a concrete dataset (single asset) or a dataset collection (e.g., ensemble members as multiple assets).

id.description: Unique identifier for this data item.

dims.description: How to read coordinate axes (lat/lon/time/level/member) from this dataset.

key.description: Key to access a coordinate variable in the data source

oneOf.description: Time dimension definition. Use 'key' + 'type' + 'timezone'. (No visual encoding here.)

timezone.description: Timezone of the dataset time coordinate.

oneOf.description: Fixed UTC offset in the form '+HH:MM' (recommended) or '+HH'. Not DST-aware.

key.description: Key/name of the variable storing time values (e.g., 'Times' or 'XTIME').

type.description: How to interpret time coordinate values.

format.description: Optional datetime format hint for parsing non-standard time strings.

vertical.description: Vertical dimension definition. Omit entirely for surface-only datasets. (null allowed for backward compatibility.)

oneOf.description: Vertical dimension definition (e.g., model levels, pressure levels, geometric height, hybrid sigma).

coord.description: Optional variable holding vertical coordinate values (if available).

encoding.description: How vertical levels should be interpreted/decoded.

oneOf.description: Vertical coordinate is interpreted as model level indices (no physical units implied).
Vertical coordinate represents pressure levels (e.g., hPa or Pa).
Vertical coordinate represents geometric height (e.g., meters above mean sea level).
Hybrid sigma/pressure coordinate. Requires coefficients and reference pressures to compute pressure at model levels.

id.description: Optional identifier dimension for station/site-based datasets (e.g., station_id).

sentinels.description: Exact values that should be treated as missing (e.g., 9999, -9999).

ranges.description: Numeric ranges to treat as missing (e.g., lt=-1e20).

items.description: Definition of a variable available in the data source.

id.description: Unique variable identifier (used for referencing in expressions).

key.description: Key to access the variable in the data source.

source.description: How to access the dataset bytes (path/url/etc).

oneOf.description: A collection of similar datasets (e.g., ensemble members stored as multiple files).

members.description: Defines the set of members in the collection.

sourceTemplate.description: How to access each member asset, using templates like {index} or {id}.

pathTemplate.description: Template for local paths, e.g., '/ens/member_{index}/wrfout.nc' or '/ens/{id}/wrfout.nc'.

memberDimension.description: Logical dimension name to use for the collection axis (for transforms/encodings).

oneOf.description: A GeoJSON FeatureCollection dataset (e.g., administrative boundaries) used for overlays/joins.

id.description: Unique identifier for this data item.

allOf.description: How to access a single concrete source asset (transport/location).

path.description: Path to a local file/folder (for file-based sources).

dims.description: Named attribute fields exposed from the GeoJSON properties object (used for joins/filters).

items.description: A transformation step. Execution order is determined by variable dependencies and then list order for ties.

expr.description: Expression AST node. Either an operator, a variable reference, or a constant.

oneOf.description: Reference to a variable id, optionally scoped to a dataset.

data.description: Optional dataset id (root.data[i].id) used to disambiguate variable references.

oneOf.description: Diagnose sea-level pressure (SLP) from near-surface fields.

data.description: Id of the derived dataset produced by this transform.

var.description: Id of the derived variable produced by this transform.

expr.description: Aggregate over time: resample/bin in time then reduce (mean/sum/...). Works for table or grid inputs.

select.description: Optional selector for where/how to aggregate values. Supports either grid field selection or table XY/value selection.

expr.description: Aggregate over space: spatial binning (optional) then reduce (mean/sum/...). Works for table or grid inputs.

bin.description: Defines how space is binned/grouped before reduction. Optional if `by` already defines spatial groups (e.g., region_id).

select.description: Optional selector for where/how to aggregate values. Supports either grid field selection or table XY/value selection.

across.description: Semantic axis. The compiler maps it to dataset-specific dims/columns (e.g., WRF bottom_top -> level).

expr.description: Reduce expression AST node (numeric reducers and probability reducers).

items.description: Scalar numeric value in expressions: either a value ref or a constant.

composition.description: A composition arranges multiple views and optionally defines shared time control and cross-view actions.

layout.description: Optional layout. If omitted and multiple views are provided, the renderer defaults to a single row with one column per view (side-by-side).

direction.description: For flow layout: row = side-by-side, column = stacked.

columns.description: For grid layout: number of columns.

rows.description: For grid layout: number of rows.

items.description: A view is a frame plus its content. Discriminated by frame.type.

time.description: Optional view-local time selection. If omitted, view may inherit composition time.

type.description: Time selection mode. v0 supports discrete timestep selection by index only.

value.description: Selected timestep index. If omitted, defaults to 0.

projection.description: Map projection identifier (kept explicit for future non-Mapbox projections).

domain.description: Optional spatial domain (if omitted, treat as auto).

state.description: Optional map camera/navigation state (if omitted, derive from domain or use a default).

items.description: A layer instance within a view, pairing geometry. Each may be a reference id or a full inline spec (fully validated).

geometry.description: Geometry layer id (string) or a full GeometrySpec object.

id.description: Unique identifier for the geometry layer.

build.description: Optional geometry build pipeline. Its allowed items depend on the layer type.

dims.description: Optional dimension selection. If omitted, all indices are used.

time.description: Select one or more indices of a dimension.

items.description: Parameters for generating contour lines from a gridded scalar field.

mask_value.description: Treat this value as missing (mask it out) before contouring.

allOf.description: Visual encoding for a geometry layer (channels + optional geometry-scoped style).

fill.description: A channel whose visual output is a color (e.g., fill/stroke).

scale.description: Color scale definition. Supports either scheme-based scales (recommended) or explicit domain/range stops.

type.description: Optional hint for the scheme family. Renderer may ignore.

reverse.description: If true, reverse the scheme order.

domain.description: Optional numeric domain override (e.g., [min, max]). If omitted, renderer infers from data.

size.description: A channel whose visual output is numeric (e.g., size/opacity/width/rotation).

allOf.description: Maps data values (domain) to visual values (range).

dash.description: Dash pattern for strokes. Kept constant-only for simplicity and broad renderer compatibility.

style.description: Geometry-scoped style. The geometry layer schema constrains its shape.

items.description: Parameters for generating filled contour bands from a gridded scalar field.

mask_value.description: Treat this value as missing (mask it out) before contouring.

items.description: Parameters for generating a mesh from a gridded scalar field.

cellFootprint.description: Fraction of each grid cell area to fill. 1 = full cell (no gaps).

targetCells.description: Soft cap on number of generated cells (used for auto stride).

input.description: Vector field inputs. Either a vector variable reference, components (u/v[/w]), or polar (speed/direction[/w]).

glyphScale.description: Global multiplier for glyph size (not data-driven).

input.description: Input reference for particles/trajectories. Either a single scalar field or multiple named fields, scoped to a dataset.

variables.description: Map of named variable ids (e.g., u/v/w, speed/direction).

mask.description: Optional rendering mask/clip (static shape or interactive selection-driven).

boundsLimits.description: Optional spatial limits within which the bbox mask may move or resize.

as.description: Selection id produced by this brush (local to the view unless routed by composition).

interactions.description: Layer-local interactions (e.g., brush/pick). Mask manipulation lives in mask.interaction.

data.description: Dataset id used as the default data source for the Vega-Lite spec.

views.description: Views in display order. Repeat a view by including multiple ViewSpec objects with different ids (and optionally different time.value).

context.description: Composition-level context: global titles, legends, and controls (e.g., a shared time slider).

controls.description: Interactive UI controls bound to view parameters (e.g., time).

oneOf.description: A slider control bound to a view parameter (v0: time).

showValue.description: Whether to display the current value.

oneOf.description: Buttons for stepping/playing a view parameter (v0: time).

legends.description: Legend specifications for encodings used in this view.

items.description: A legend for an encoding (by encoding id).

encoding.description: Encoding id this legend refers to.

type.description: Legend type. 'auto' lets the renderer infer from encoding channels.

source.description: Optional explicit interaction source. Usually needed for event-based interactions like click.

dim.description: Dimension selected by the interaction, e.g. time, member, id.
